scripts.clean: rm -rf services/dashboard/.next node_modules/.cache .turbo services/*/.turbo && pnpm --filter @flight-hunter/shared build
scripts.kill: pkill -9 -f 'chrome-headless-shell' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'tsx watch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'tsc --watch' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'All processes killed'
scripts.dev: pnpm kill; pnpm clean && turbo dev
